message:
Command `# after_grt.guide is 39MB (written at 01:57) - GRT completed writing the guide.
# antenna.rpt is 0 bytes - antenna check may still be running or returned empty (good).
# Process at low CPU - might be writing ODB to disk (large file).
# Wait for state_out.json to appear.
sleep 300
ps -p $(cat /tmp/pnr_v4.pid) -o pid,stat,pcpu,etime --no-header 2>/dev/null || echo "ENDED"
ls -la /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/ | grep "^[0-9]" | tail -8
ls -la /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/32-openroad-globalrouting/ 2>/dev/null | tail -5
tail -3 /tmp/pnr_v4.log` executed with exit code 0.
